variants.title: Fleetguard ST1930 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Eppensteiner 1561P25A000P
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard ST1930 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Eppensteiner 1561P25A000P
variants.description: Fleetguard® ST1930 hydraulic cartridge filter is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 142.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 94.0 mm, Length: 264.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 30 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Filtrec RVR1561K20B Return Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 1561P25A000P
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RVR1561K20B Return Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 1561P25A000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RVR1561K20B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RVR1561K20B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β.
